sentences.en: Time to get dressed for the day.
sentences.zh: 該換衣服準備出門了。
sentences.ipa: /taɪm tuː ɡet drest fɔːr ðə deɪ/

sentences.en: Chew slowly and swallow before you talk.
sentences.zh: 慢慢咀嚼，吞下去再說話。
sentences.ipa: /tʃuː ˈsloʊli ənd ˈswɑːloʊ bɪˈfɔːr juː tɔːk/

sentences.en: Dry off and put on your pajamas.
sentences.zh: 擦乾身體，穿上睡衣。
sentences.ipa: /draɪ ɔːf ənd pʊt ɑːn jʊər pəˈdʒɑːməz/

sentences.en: Look out the window, we're almost there.
sentences.zh: 看看窗外，我們快到了。
sentences.ipa: /lʊk aʊt ðə ˈwɪndoʊ wɪər ˈɔːlmoʊst ðer/

sentences.en: Be careful climbing up the ladder.
sentences.zh: 爬梯子要小心。
sentences.ipa: /biː ˈkerfəl ˈklaɪmɪŋ ʌp ðə ˈlædər/

sentences.en: Remember to listen to your teacher.
sentences.zh: 記得要聽老師的話。
sentences.ipa: /rɪˈmembər tuː ˈlɪsən tuː jʊər ˈtiːtʃər/

sentences.en: Show me how you solved this problem.
sentences.zh: 給我看看你怎麼解這題的。
sentences.ipa: /ʃoʊ miː haʊ juː sɑːlvd ðɪs ˈprɑːbləm/

sentences.en: Please don't grab toys from others.
sentences.zh: 請不要從別人手上搶玩具。
sentences.ipa: /pliːz doʊnt ɡræb tɔɪz frʌm ˈʌðərz/

sentences.en: I know you're frustrated, let's talk about it.
sentences.zh: 我知道你很挫折，我們來聊聊吧。
sentences.ipa: /aɪ noʊ jʊər ˈfrʌstreɪtɪd lets tɔːk əˈbaʊt ɪt/

sentences.en: You need to say sorry to your friend.
sentences.zh: 你需要跟朋友道歉。
sentences.ipa: /juː niːd tuː seɪ ˈsɑːri tuː jʊər frend/

sentences.en: Great job cleaning up your room!
sentences.zh: 把房間整理好，做得很棒！
sentences.ipa: /ɡreɪt dʒɑːb ˈkliːnɪŋ ʌp jʊər ruːm/

sentences.en: Don't touch the stove, it's hot.
sentences.zh: 不要碰爐子，很燙。
sentences.ipa: /doʊnt tʌtʃ ðə stoʊv ɪts hɑːt/

sentences.en: It's time for your check-up.
sentences.zh: 該做健康檢查了。
sentences.ipa: /ɪts taɪm fɔːr jʊər ˈtʃekʌp/

sentences.en: Say thank you for the gift, Uncle gave you.
sentences.zh: 要謝謝叔叔給你的禮物。
sentences.ipa: /seɪ θæŋk juː fɔːr ðə ɡɪft ˈʌŋkl ɡeɪv juː/

sentences.en: Let's ask your friend if he wants to join.
sentences.zh: 我們問問你朋友要不要一起加入吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets æsk jʊər frend ɪf hiː wɑːnts tuː dʒɔɪn/

sentences.en: Wait for others to finish speaking.
sentences.zh: 要等別人說完話。
sentences.ipa: /weɪt fɔːr ˈʌðərz tuː ˈfɪnɪʃ ˈspiːkɪŋ/

sentences.en: It's sunny today, let's wear a hat.
sentences.zh: 今天出太陽，我們戴頂帽子吧。
sentences.ipa: /ɪts ˈsʌni təˈdeɪ lets wer ə hæt/

sentences.en: Let's take a break from the screen.
sentences.zh: 我們先休息一下不看螢幕吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets teɪk ə breɪk frʌm ðə skriːn/

sentences.en: Who should we invite to the celebration?
sentences.zh: 我們應該邀請誰來慶祝呢？
sentences.ipa: /huː ʃʊd wiː ɪnˈvaɪt tuː ðə ˌselɪˈbreɪʃən/

sentences.en: You can pick the bedtime story tonight.
sentences.zh: 今晚你可以挑選睡前故事。
sentences.ipa: /juː kæn pɪk ðə ˈbedtaɪm ˈstɔːri təˈnaɪt/
